shared_attributes.movement: scroll left (ground at Current_Speed, clouds at Current_Speed * 0.5)

context.role: Optional decorative texture above ground line for visual interest
context.screen_position: y=0 to 10px above ground_line, spans entire screen width, scrolls left at Current_Speed
context.usage_scenario: Provides subtle visual detail to ground without distracting from gameplay, optional implementation (can be omitted for pure minimal style)

visual_specification.shape: Sparse pattern of small rocks or grass tufts
visual_specification.texture: Minimal pixel art pattern, low density (elements every 50-100px)

animation.description: No sprite animation. Movement is position-based scrolling. When x < -1200, reset to x += 1200 for seamless tiling

visual_specification.details: Sparse placement of 2-4px small rocks or grass tufts in primary color, pattern repeats seamlessly every 1200px, very low visual density to avoid distraction

relationships.shared_with: Same color and scrolling behavior as ground_line
relationships.differences_from: ground_line is mandatory 2px line, ground_texture is optional 10px decorative layer. Ground_line has collision, ground_texture is visual only

explicit_negations: No transparency except full alpha channel
No high contrast elements that distract from gameplay
